element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Extended combo range and damage variation
Resource management and positioning for special attacks
Aerial combat against airborne or elevated enemies
Pattern recognition, special attack timing, multi-phase battles
Screen-scrolling shmup mechanics, vertical movement awareness

element_introduction_order.element: Allied Avengers assist (Wasp, Quicksilver, Wonder Man, Namor)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Coordination with AI allies, additional damage phases
Culmination of all combat mechanics and special attack mastery

typical_tension_triggers: Boss villain appearance (Klaw, Living Laser, Whirlwind, Sentinel, Wizard, Grim Reaper, Mandarin, Juggernaut, Ultron, Controller, Crossbones, Red Skull)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arcade-style escalating intensity with rhythmic enemy waves punctuated by boss encounters and mechanic variation via flying sequences

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to hand-to-hand combat and basic enemy patterns with generic henchmen
difficulty_curve.mid_game: First supervillain encounters (Klaw, Living Laser, Whirlwind, Sentinel, Wizard, Grim Reaper, Mandarin) with increased enemy density and introduction of flying sequences
difficulty_curve.late_game: Powerful villains (Juggernaut, Ultron, Controller, Crossbones) followed by Red Skull final confrontation; integration of all learned mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Side-scrolling levels with free horizontal movement, waves of generic enemies followed by supervillain boss encounters. Players execute hand-to-hand combos, throw ground items, and unleash Avenger Attack special moves.

Occasional shift from ground combat to vertical-scrolling or forward-scrolling shooting sequences. Iron Man and Vision fly autonomously; Captain America and Hawkeye use flying machines. Introduces projectile-focused gameplay.
Late-game concentration of powerful supervillains with increasing complexity and multi-phase patterns, culminating in Red Skull final boss battle requiring mastery of all character mechanics.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final levels (Juggernaut, Ultron, Controller, Crossbones, Red Skull)

sources_used: wikipedia: Captain America and The Avengers
